pages.text: The $(item)Ritual Dagger$() is your primary tool for creating and managing magic rituals. It has 250 durability and deals 4 attack damage.

$(bold)Right-click$() with the dagger to open the Sigil Selection screen, where you can choose a magic circle type to place at your feet.$(br2)$(bold)Shift + Right-click$() to open the Radius Selection screen, where you can place a Magic Center Block with a chosen radius.
